subtitle: Gift Exchange Randomizer
description: Add your participants and mark anyone who shouldn't be paired together. Eidiyah will handle the rest.
importHint: One name per line. Add ,Name to exclude a pairing.
duplicateNames: Duplicate names found — every participant must have a unique name.
invalidExclude: "{{exclude}}" in the exclusion for "{{name}}" doesn't match any participant name.
noAssignment: Couldn't find a valid assignment with these constraints. Try removing some pairings.
